title: Add typed errors for analytics error classification
body:
## Background

From PR #284 code review findings (`7b2b767b`, `d51971e7`).

## Problem

The `emitReviewFailed` function in `internal/usecase/review/orchestrator.go` uses string matching to classify errors:

```go
if strings.Contains(err.Error(), "provider") {
    errCode = "provider_error"
} else if strings.Contains(err.Error(), "validation") {
    errCode = "validation_error"
}
```

This is fragile - an error message like "failed to contact provider service" would be classified as `provider_error` even if the actual issue was network-related.

## Solution

1. Define typed/sentinel errors in the relevant packages
2. Use `errors.Is()` / `errors.As()` for classification
3. Centralize error classification logic with tests

## Files

- `internal/usecase/review/orchestrator.go` - `classifyError` function
- Potentially new error types in `internal/usecase/review/errors.go`
